title: <div><font face=".AppleColorEmojiUI">✅</font> 6️⃣ Discussion Activity (Engagemen
content:
✅ 6️⃣ Discussion Activity (Engagement with peers, prompt, instructions, rubric, and response expectations)
✅ 7️⃣ Major Writing Assignment (Instructions, submission format, rubric, and detailed grading breakdown)
✅ 8️⃣ Week Summary (Wrap-up, key takeaways, and preparation for the next week)

📌 1.2 Variable Sections (Adjust Per Week)

🔹 Core Writing Skills Presentation (May be 1+ slides, depending on Canvas content.)
🔹 Common Mistakes & How to Fix Them (May be included in some weeks but not others.)
🔹 Grammar, Style, & Mechanics Review (If listed as a knowledge check, we include it.)
🔹 Knowledge Check (Only included if Canvas lists one for that week.)
🔹 Process & Structure Presentation (If applicable, covering organization and essay construction.)
context: From document: ENG 101 | Course Content Formatting & Protocols — chunk 2 (chunk 2/8)
